## Validation

- [ ] Unit tests and unsigned Release build pass
- [ ] Camera, location, journal, and StoreKit privacy boundaries were reviewed
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or recordings
- [ ] App Store metadata remains aligned with shipped behavior
